$description: Component tokens for Mobile Text Area component - a multiline text input field for longer-form user input. A fixed 240px tall field with uniform 8px padding, optional label above, optional hint text below, and an optional character count displayed inside the field (bottom-right). Supports 4 states: Default, Focused, Success, Disabled. No destructive/error state in this component — error feedback is handled via hint text color change. Figma Reference: Node ID 528-21651

$component.name: Text Area
$component.description: A mobile multiline text input component for longer-form content such as notes, comments, descriptions, or messages. Features a fixed-height scrollable text area with internal character counter, an optional label row above, and optional hint text below. Unlike the single-line Input component, the text area uses uniform padding on all sides and a thicker 3px border ring for focused and success states.
$component.structure: Vertical flex container (gap 4px) with: optional Label row at top, text area field (white/gray background with border, 240px height, 8px padding, overflow scroll), hint text below. Character count renders inside the field aligned to bottom-right.

sizes.default: Single fixed size — 361px wide, 240px tall field. No size variants.

variants.default: Idle state — white background, gray/300 border (1px), placeholder text gray/500, shadow/xs
variants.focused: Active/typing state — white background, primary/blue/600 border (3px), input text gray/900, no shadow
variants.success: Validated state — white background, success/600 border (3px), input text gray/900, no shadow
variants.disabled: Inactive state — gray/100 background, no border, muted text gray/400, shadow/xs

usage.contexts: Comment boxes, notes fields, bio/description forms, message composers, feedback forms, address fields, long-form data entry
usage.features: Multiline text input, optional character counter (inside field, bottom-right), 4 interaction states, optional label with mandatory indicator and info icon, optional hint text

container.$comment: Outer wrapper tokens — the vertical stack holding label, field, and hint text

width.description: Mobile text area container width - 361px fixed

gap.description: Mobile text area container gap between label, input field, and hint text - 4px

field.$comment: The multiline text area input field itself — distinct from the single-line Input component in height, padding, and active border width

height.description: Mobile text area field height - 240px (fixed, scrollable overflow)

width.description: Mobile text area field width - full width of container (361px)

padding.description: Mobile text area field padding - 8px all sides (uniform, unlike single-line input)

radius.description: Mobile text area field border radius - 6px

default.description: Mobile text area default/disabled border width - 1px

active.description: Mobile text area focused/success border width - 3px (thicker ring to indicate active/validated state)

default.description: Mobile text area default and disabled state shadow - shadow/xs - 0px 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.05)

active.description: Mobile text area focused and success state shadow - none (shadow removed when border ring is visible)

typography.$comment: Typography for text inside the textarea field — same scale as single-line input sm size

input.description: Mobile text area input text typography - 14px Regular, 20px line-height (font/size/lg, font/weight/regular)

character-count.$comment: Character count indicator rendered inside the field at bottom-right (e.g. '0/200', '30/200'). Typography matches input text. Color follows input text state.

typography.description: Mobile text area character count typography - 14px Regular, 20px line-height (matches input text)

alignment.description: Mobile text area character count text alignment - right-aligned within field width

default.description: Mobile text area character count color in default state - gray/500 - #667085 (matches placeholder text)

focused.description: Mobile text area character count color in focused state - gray/900 - #101828 (matches active input text)

success.description: Mobile text area character count color in success state - gray/900 - #101828

disabled.description: Mobile text area character count color in disabled state - gray/400 - #98a2b3 (matches disabled input text)

label.$comment: Label row above the text area field. Consistent with input-form.json md size label tokens.

height.description: Mobile text area label row height - 24px

gap.description: Mobile text area label internal gap between label text, mandatory asterisk, and info icon - 4px

typography.description: Mobile text area label text typography - 16px Medium, 24px line-height (font/size/2xl, font/weight/medium)

default.description: Mobile text area label text color - neutral/gray-700 - #344054

mandatory.description: Mobile text area mandatory asterisk (*) color - error/600 - #d92d20

size.description: Mobile text area label info icon size - 12px

hint-text.$comment: Hint text below the field — provides guidance or validation feedback. Consistent with input-form-hint-text.json.

typography.description: Mobile text area hint text typography - 14px Regular, 20px line-height (font/size/lg, font/weight/regular)

default.description: Mobile text area hint text default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

color.$comment: Per-state color tokens for the text area field — background, border, and input text. Mirrors the color token structure from input.json for consistency.

default.$comment: Idle/unfocused state — placeholder-style text, subtle border

background.description: Mobile text area default background - white - #ffffff

border.description: Mobile text area default border color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

text.description: Mobile text area default text color - gray/500 - #667085 (placeholder state)

focused.$comment: Active typing state — primary blue ring, dark text

background.description: Mobile text area focused background - white - #ffffff

border.description: Mobile text area focused border color - primary/blue-600 - #155eef

text.description: Mobile text area focused text color - gray/900 - #101828

success.$comment: Validated/confirmed state — green ring, dark text

background.description: Mobile text area success background - white - #ffffff

border.description: Mobile text area success border color - success/600 - #039855

text.description: Mobile text area success text color - gray/900 - #101828

disabled.$comment: Inactive state — gray background, no border, muted text

background.description: Mobile text area disabled background - gray/100 - #f2f4f7

border.description: Mobile text area disabled border - transparent (no visible border in disabled state)

text.description: Mobile text area disabled text color - gray/400 - #98a2b3
